scale.usage: Card titles, date labels on entry headers
Journal entry body text — primary reading size

principles: All transitions breathe — minimum 400ms, never snappy or mechanical
Entry content fades in with a gentle upward drift (+12px), never slides from side
AI responses appear word-by-word or via soft fade — never instant pop
Page transitions use a slow cross-fade, not a horizontal slide
Never use spring or bounce easing — warmth comes from ease-out, not elasticity

button.notes: Primary button uses accentPrimary fill with inkPrimary-dark text. Ghost variant uses borderSubtle border only. No shadows. Pressed state: 8% opacity darkening, no scale transform.

card.elevation: none — cards are distinguished by surfaceSecondary background, not shadow
card.notes: Journal entry cards use no border and no shadow. Separation is achieved through background color difference and generous vertical spacing (24dp gap between cards). Never use Material Card elevation.

inputField.notes: Single-line inputs use height 56. Multi-line journal entry area is unconstrained height with min-height 200. borderSubtle border at rest; accentPrimary border on focus. No filled-background style — use outlined only.

listTile.divider: none — use vertical spacing only, no Divider widget

bottomSheet.notes: Use a 4px drag handle in borderSubtle color. Background is surfaceSecondary. Max height 80% of screen. Always animates with durationDefault easing.

patterns.emptyState: Text only — a single short sentence in inkSecondary at bodyMedium. Example: 'This is your space. Nothing to catch up on.' No illustration, no icon, no button unless the primary action is contextually obvious.
patterns.loadingState: Shimmer skeleton using surfaceTint animated at 1.8s loop. For AI-generating states: three soft dots pulsing at 600ms intervals in inkDisabled color. Never CircularProgressIndicator.
patterns.errorState: Inline text below the failed element in statusError color at bodySmall. Tone: 'Something slipped — try again when you're ready.' No modal dialogs, no alert banners.
patterns.successFeedback: The triggering element itself provides feedback: save button label softens to inkSecondary for 800ms then returns, or text color briefly transitions through accentSubtle. No SnackBar, no Toast, no modal. The writing area's border quietly fades from accentPrimary back to borderSubtle.

notes: inkPrimary #2A2018 on surfacePrimary #FAF7F2 achieves contrast ratio ~13:1
accentPrimary #C06B5A on surfacePrimary fails AA for small text — use only for large interactive elements or icons
Always provide haptic feedback for destructive actions even when visual feedback is subtle
Mood color temperature indicators must include a non-color label for colorblind users

antiPatterns: No Material Card with elevation shadows — they make the UI feel like a productivity app
No pure white #FFFFFF backgrounds — always use surfacePrimary #FAF7F2 or warmer
No CircularProgressIndicator — use shimmer or soft dot animations
No SnackBar or Toast for success states — use in-context micro-transitions
No Divider widget — achieve separation with spacing and background color
No bold or saturated accent colors — maintain low saturation throughout
No horizontal slide page transitions — use cross-fade or vertical fade
No all-caps text — it reads as clinical and impersonal
No data charts with axes or percentage labels for emotional content
No gamification elements (streaks, badges, completion bars)
No push notification prompts within the UI — never interrupt the user
No linear bounce or spring animations — ease-out only
platformNotes: Flutter implementation: use ThemeData with colorScheme defined via ColorScheme.fromSeed seeded from #C06B5A, then override with exact token values. Text themes map: displayLarge→displayLarge, bodyLarge→bodyLarge, etc. Typography: use google_fonts package for Lora (display) and Inter (body). Spacing tokens: define as a SpacingTokens class with static const doubles. Motion: all AnimatedContainer/AnimatedOpacity use Duration(milliseconds: 450) with Curves.easeOut. Disable ink splash on most tappable surfaces by wrapping with Theme(data: theme.copyWith(splashFactory: NoSplash.splashFactory)). Bottom sheets: use showModalBottomSheet with shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.vertical(top: Radius.circular(24))). For text rendering, set textHeightBehavior to trim ascent/descent for tighter typographic control.
